# Changelog v0.8.0

Release Date: 2026-06-29

## 🔌 API

- Support image_url content in chat completions. (see PR [#2459](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2459)) - See [API changes](./api.md)
- Expose remove_thinking_from_context completion param. (see PR [#2797](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2797)) - See [API changes](./api.md)
- Harden Gemma4 completion drains. (see PR [#2802](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2802)) - See [API changes](./api.md)

## 📘 Docs

- Document OpenCode plugin model choices. (see PR [#2725](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2725))
- Update npm package homepage metadata. (see PR [#2810](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2810))
- Define agent-stack test ownership. (see PR [#2823](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2823))

## 🧪 Tests

- Replace @qvac/cli BATS e2e with a node:test suite. (see PR [#2696](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2696))
- Cover chat agent OpenAI shapes. (see PR [#2824](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2824))

## 🧹 Chores

- Switch @qvac/cli to Lunte and Prettier. (see PR [#2829](https://github.com/tetherto/qvac/pull/2829))
